scripts.vercel-build: cp -r web/* . && cp -r web/icons . 2>/dev/null; node -e "const fs=require('fs');const vm=require('vm');for(const f of fs.readdirSync('.').filter(f=>f.endsWith('.html'))){const h=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8');const m=[...h.matchAll(/<script>([\s\S]*?)<\/script>/g)];for(const[,s]of m){try{new vm.Script(s,{filename:f})}catch(e){console.error(f+': JS syntax error:',e.message);process.exit(1)}}}" && echo 'Build OK: '$(ls *.html *.json *.js icons/*.png 2>/dev/null | wc -l)' static files'
